entity.label: En-tappuah
entity.subtitle: Landmark
entity.description: En-tappuah, the well of the apple, probably one of the springs near Yassuf (Josh. 17:7).

nodes.label: En-tappuah
nodes.description: En-tappuah, the well of the apple, probably one of the springs near Yassuf (Josh. 17:7).

verses.text: And the coast of Manasseh was from Asher to Michmethah, that lieth before Shechem; and the border went along on the right hand unto the inhabitants of Entappuah.
